zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Saye於大約1112年出生時，她的父親Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon29歲，母親Lucy De Rumilly21歲。她於1128年與Richard Du Hommet在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1160年在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Saye于大约1112年出生时，她的父亲Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon29岁，母亲Lucy De Rumilly21岁。她于1128年与Richard Du Hommet在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1160年在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Saye was born about 1112, her father, Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon, was 29 and her mother, Lucy De Rumilly, was 21. She married Richard Du Hommet in 1128, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1160, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Saye est née environ 1112, son père, Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lucy De Rumilly, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Du Hommet en 1128, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Saye um 1112 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon 29 und ihre Mutter Lucy De Rumilly 21. Sie hat 1128 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Du Hommet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Saye è nata il circa 1112, sua padre, Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lucy De Rumilly, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard Du Hommet nel 1128, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1160, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Sayeが約1112年に生まれた時，父Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odonは29歳，母Lucy De Rumillyは21歳であった。1128年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでRichard Du Hommetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1160年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Saye(이)가 대략 1112년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy De Rumilly(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Richard Du Hommet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Saye nasceu aproximadamente 1112, seu pai, Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lucy De Rumilly, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Du Hommet em 1128, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Saye родилась около 1112 г., её отцу по имени Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy De Rumilly, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Du Hommet в 1128 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Saye nació aproximadamente 1112, su papá, Jourdain de Say Seigneur d’Aunay-sur-Odon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lucy De Rumilly, tenía 21 años. Murió en 1160, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
